items.degree: B.Sc. Eng. (Hons) in Civil and Environmental Engineering
items.institution: Faculty of Engineering, University of Ruhuna, Sri Lanka
items.description: Undergraduate degree in Civil and Environmental Engineering with academic exposure to structural engineering, environmental engineering, transportation engineering, surveying, construction management, and digital construction technologies.

items.degree: G.C.E. Advanced Level - Physical Science Stream
items.description: Completed Advanced Level studies in the Physical Science stream, providing a strong foundation in mathematics, physics, and engineering-related analytical thinking.
Completed and continuing professional learning related to BIM, CAD design, digital construction, project management, and engineering software applications.
Participated in workshops and training programs related to civil engineering, construction technology, BIM workflows, and professional development.
